_note: Sample card pool slice (12 cards) demonstrating the schema in action. The full M1 pool will be 60-80 cards (18 portraits + actions + tools + Kin). These 12 are the simulator's first deck and the engine's first integration test.

cards.name: The Listener
cards.rulesText: Activated: Tap, pay 1 Attention. Look at the top card of opponent's deck and put it back.
cards.flavorText: I'm not going to tell you what I'd do. Tell me again what happened.

cards.name: The Storyteller
cards.rulesText: Activated: Tap, pay 1 Attention. Name a virtue you've Practiced. Capture a Moment named after it.
cards.flavorText: Did I ever tell you about your grandfather? Sit down. This one matters.

ops.prompt: Name a virtue you've Practiced this match.

ops.name: TOLD_AGAIN
ops.flavor: He told the story so often that the kid started telling it back.

cards.name: The In-Progress Dad
cards.rulesText: Each turn you Practice a new virtue, gain a Growth counter. With 3+ counters, your Trying cards cost -1.
cards.flavorText: I'm learning to be a better person every day. I cannot change the past. I can only course correct.

cards.name: The Coach
cards.rulesText: While in play, friendly cards entering this zone get +1 to their first effect.
cards.flavorText: You miss 100% of the shots. So take it. I've got the rebound.

moment.name: PEP TALK
moment.flavor: You miss 100% of the shots. So take it. I've got the rebound.

cards.name: The Stepdad
cards.rulesText: Counts as carrying every virtue tag of friendly Kin sharing his zone (for Resonance only).
cards.flavorText: I don't have to be here. That's the point.

cards.name: The Tinkerer
cards.rulesText: Activated: Tap, pay 1 Attention. Return a card from your discard to your hand.
cards.flavorText: Replaces the wrong washer. Floods the basement. Laughs first. Then fixes it.

cards.name: What Do You Think?
cards.rulesText: Reveal opponent's hand. Both players draw 1 card. (You ask the question; everyone learns something.)
cards.flavorText: I don't know. What do you think?

cards.name: Burned the First One
cards.rulesText: Discard one card from your hand. Draw two cards.
cards.flavorText: Burnt the first one. Got the second one right. The kid ate three.

cards.name: Pep Talk
cards.rulesText: Target friendly Kin gains +2 Maturity. Capture a PEP TALK Moment if a Coach-tagged card is in any zone.
cards.flavorText: You're going to be fine. You're going to be better than fine. I'll be there either way.

moment.name: PEP TALK
moment.flavor: You miss 100% of the shots. So take it. I've got the rebound.

cards.name: Take the Long Way Home
cards.rulesText: Until end of turn, your cards in Your Family are immune to opponent's tax_attention and arrange ops.
cards.flavorText: Drove the long way. Didn't say why. The kid figured it out.

cards.name: The Toolbelt
cards.rulesText: Attach to a Dad card you control. The Dad gains the Mending tag (if not already) and +1 Pitch value.
cards.flavorText: Still has the same hammer. Still loses the same screwdriver. Always finds it.

cards.name: The Eldest
cards.rulesText: When a Dad activates in The Eldest's zone, gains 1 Maturity and records that Dad's virtue tags. At end of match, count up to (Maturity) distinct recorded virtues you haven't Practiced; mark each Practiced.
cards.flavorText: They're watching you. They've been watching for a while.
